creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Alfonso S. Siciliano from comment #7)
Thanks. I am just curious to know what is the difference between https://github.com/CMB/edbrowse and https://github.com/edbrowse/edbrowse and what is your rationale behind choosing the one from CMB rather than edbrowse while it looks like edbrowse is the official repository?
